command:
grep -q "export const PhaseConfigSchema" src/lib/config/Config.ts && echo "PhaseConfigSchema OK"
grep -q "export const AppConfigSchema" src/lib/config/Config.ts && echo "AppConfigSchema OK"
grep -q "NIGHT: PhaseConfigSchema" src/lib/config/Config.ts && echo "NIGHT OK"
outputSnippet:
PhaseConfigSchema OK
AppConfigSchema OK
NIGHT OK

command:
grep -q "export const PhaseConfigSchema" src/lib/config/Config.ts && echo "PhaseConfigSchema: OK"
grep -q "export const AppConfigSchema" src/lib/config/Config.ts && echo "AppConfigSchema: OK"
grep -q "NIGHT: PhaseConfigSchema" src/lib/config/Config.ts && echo "NIGHT phase: OK"
outputSnippet:
PhaseConfigSchema: OK
AppConfigSchema: OK
NIGHT phase: OK
